{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Skysworn headquarters
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] have a headquarters.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Soulsmith foundry]] is located in the [[Skysworn]]’s tower.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
